title: Create a Game
subtitle: Design your own lottery game. After submission, an admin will review and approve it.
successText1: Your game has been submitted for review. An admin will approve it shortly.
successText2: Once approved, it will appear in the games list for everyone to play.
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the game rules and format...
mainHint_one: Players will pick {{count}} number from {{min}} to {{max}} (range of {{range}})
mainHint_other: Players will pick {{count}} numbers from {{min}} to {{max}} (range of {{range}})
bonusHint_one: Players will also pick {{count}} bonus number from {{min}} to {{max}}
bonusHint_other: Players will also pick {{count}} bonus numbers from {{min}} to {{max}}

validation.minLessThanMax: Min number must be less than max number
validation.minAtLeast1: Min number must be at least 1
validation.maxAtMost100: Max number must be at most 100
validation.selectLessThanRange: Numbers to select must be less than the range
validation.bonusMinLessThanMax: Bonus min must be less than bonus max
validation.bonusMinAtLeast1: Bonus min must be at least 1
validation.bonusMaxAtMost100: Bonus max must be at most 100
validation.bonusAtLeast1: Must select at least 1 bonus number
validation.bonusLessThanRange: Bonus count must be less than the bonus range
